prompt: Professional commercial product photography. A matte black stainless steel insulated water bottle with a laser-engraved football club crest sits on dark rubber gym flooring. An iPhone is magnetically attached to the bottle lid mount at 75 degrees in landscape mode, screen showing the camera viewfinder recording. In the soft background, a person is mid-squat with a barbell. Gym towel nearby. Dramatic side lighting creating atmosphere. POV from floor level, wide angle. Hyper-realistic advertising photography style.
